title: Enchanting Table Magic Circle
description: Adds a magic circle to the enchanting table that appears when you approach it
body:
[![Modrinth - My other projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/modrinth-My_other_projects-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo) [![Discord - Jacosvaldo's Not Too Cool Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Jacosvaldo%27s%20_Not_Too_Cool_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/cPYyf3JqgU) [![Kofi - Tip me](https://img.shields.io/badge/kofi-Tip_me-F26B2E?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi)](https://ko-fi.com/jacosvaldo) ## 🧩 Dependencies - [EMF‎](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)‎ is required! - For color variants use [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod - For animated textures to work on fabric use [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) mod *if you're playing in versions above 1.21.6 you can download this [version](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica/version/0.6.1+1.21.5) of Animatica, it works, but if you're playing in versions above 1.21.8 you'll need to activete the **BRUTEFORCE mode** in the texture settings (more about this below)* ## ✅️ Mod Support Should work for every mod that uses a book entity, like [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) mod or [Quark Oddities](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark-oddities) mod ## 🛠️ Shaders Troubleshooting First make sure to enable labPBR support at your shaders config normally it looks like this: ### Complementary shaders: ![Resourcepack support (labPBR)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d851ca3264ebc9a606ecde25a7d0038cc0fb6a79.png) ### BSL (at the materials tab): ![labPBR in BSL shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2f41665db9817498901aab2b120a30f38e61d8c_0.webp) **If just this doesn't fix it, try disabling the animated textures, 99% of the time it works** ## 🚨 BRUTEFORCE mode: **Don't use BRUTEFORCE mode if you're trying to use shaders, it was only made to make the animated textures work in versions >= 1.21.9** To use it you'll probably have to set *RenderLayer override* to *Translucent*, to do this go to the mods tab, enter the *Entity Model Features* mod config and follow this path: **Per entity settings** > **Enchanting Table** > **Textures** Now set **RenderLayer override** to **Translucent** ---
🎨 Color Variants ![Color variants Purple, Pink, Red, Orange, Flame, Gold, White, Green, Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gLbwPaHh/images/cd31fba1b84541b96451501932c6b0408e27294d.png)
▶️ Video Preview
✨ Shaders Screenshots ## BSL: ![Red variant with BLS Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3caae6c918a32c50d2dbd9028eb0f920da93e6.jpeg) ## Complementary Shader: ![Water variant with Complementary Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50e4341a70100a5d3b8f2ddd148b57ec0c17d130.jpeg) ![Pink variant with Complementary Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f301cffd38fbe41982096dcae32759f644093c5.jpeg) ## Super Duper Vanilla: ![White variant with Super Duper Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6533a1987b92150a121622d77edcdc159fd1463.jpeg) ## Miniature Shader (Custom build): ![Pink variant with Miniature Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ec13eb048f51643bd78b5b546c345586ba72147.jpeg)
## 💼 My works [![Use code JACOS for 25% discount at Sparked Host servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c027e7de8616ac177d4267980d53eaacfa9e2022_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3074)
